# Deus Ex: Human Revolution

name: Extras Debug Menu In The Pause Menu
mode: once
w32 0072C24C 3BA00001

name: Max Credits On Buy
mode: once
w32 0044F16C 3C007FFF

name: Max Credits While In Shop
mode: once
w32 00751CAC 3FA07FFF
